title: onosma polychroma
intro: Onosma polychroma, also known as the Himalayan onosma, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is known for its bright yellow or orange flowers. Traditionally, Onosma polychroma has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
